creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-05-26 02:17:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-POD2-Base Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  p5-POD2-Base is an abstraction of the code in POD2::IT and
  POD2::FR. These modules belong to the Italian and the French
  translation projects of core Perl pods.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/POD2-Base/
  
  PR:             ports/146974
  Submitted by:   Ashish SHUKLA <wahjava@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1462    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/textproc/p5-POD2-Base/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-POD2-Base/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-POD2-Base/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/textproc/p5-POD2-Base/pkg-plist (new)
